falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above the 50-day moving average by 2% or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a trend reversal against the bottom pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 200% of the 14-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Abnormal volume spikes would indicate a blowoff top scenario, contradicting the bottom pattern and falsifying the UNKNOWN verdict

falsification_conditions.condition: The US 10-year Treasury yield rises above 4.5% and holds there for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant bond market move would invalidate the pattern by creating conflicting macro signals that contradict the current HOLD

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
